ISO_27001_A.5.1.source_control_text: A set of policies for information security shall be defined, approved by management, published and communicated to employees and relevant external parties.

ISO_27001_A.5.2.source_control_text: All information security responsibilities shall be defined and allocated.
ISO_27001_A.5.2.target_control_title: Roles and responsibilities for cybersecurity risk management

ISO_27001_A.5.3.source_control_text: Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility shall be segregated.
ISO_27001_A.5.3.target_control_title: Access permissions and authorizations are managed

ISO_27001_A.5.4.source_control_text: Management shall require all personnel to apply information security in accordance with established policies.
ISO_27001_A.5.4.target_control_title: Organizational leadership is responsible for cybersecurity risk

ISO_27001_A.5.5.source_control_text: The organization shall establish and maintain contact with relevant authorities.
ISO_27001_A.5.5.target_control_title: Internal and external stakeholders are notified of incidents
ISO_27001_A.5.5.gap_description: Partial — authority contact is broader than incident notification

ISO_27001_A.5.7.source_control_text: Information relating to information security threats shall be collected and analysed.
ISO_27001_A.5.7.target_control_title: Cyber threat intelligence is received from forums and sources

ISO_27001_A.5.9.source_control_title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
ISO_27001_A.5.9.source_control_text: An inventory of information and other associated assets shall be developed and maintained.
ISO_27001_A.5.9.target_control_title: Inventories of hardware managed by the organization are maintained

ISO_27001_A.5.12.source_control_text: Information shall be classified according to the information security needs of the organization.
ISO_27001_A.5.12.target_control_title: Assets are prioritized based on classification, criticality

ISO_27001_A.5.15.source_control_text: Rules to control physical and logical access to information shall be established.
ISO_27001_A.5.15.target_control_title: Access permissions and authorizations are managed

ISO_27001_A.5.16.source_control_text: The full life cycle of identities shall be managed.
ISO_27001_A.5.16.target_control_title: Identities and credentials for authorized users are managed

ISO_27001_A.5.19.source_control_text: Processes shall be defined to manage information security risks associated with suppliers.
ISO_27001_A.5.19.target_control_title: Cybersecurity supply chain risk management policy is established

ISO_27001_A.6.1.source_control_text: Background verification checks on all candidates shall be carried out prior to joining.
ISO_27001_A.6.1.target_control_title: Cybersecurity is included in HR practices
ISO_27001_A.6.1.gap_description: Partial — screening is one part of HR cybersecurity practices

ISO_27001_A.6.3.source_control_title: Information security awareness, education and training
ISO_27001_A.6.3.source_control_text: Personnel shall receive appropriate awareness, education and training.
ISO_27001_A.6.3.target_control_title: Personnel are provided with awareness and training

ISO_27001_A.7.1.source_control_text: Security perimeters shall be defined and used to protect areas containing information.
ISO_27001_A.7.1.target_control_title: Physical access to assets is managed, monitored, and enforced

ISO_27001_A.7.4.source_control_text: Premises shall be continuously monitored for unauthorized physical access.

ISO_27001_A.8.1.source_control_text: Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices shall be protected.

ISO_27001_A.8.2.source_control_text: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.
ISO_27001_A.8.2.target_control_title: Access permissions and authorizations are managed

ISO_27001_A.8.5.source_control_text: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented.
ISO_27001_A.8.5.target_control_title: Users, services, and hardware are authenticated

ISO_27001_A.8.7.source_control_text: Protection against malware shall be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.
ISO_27001_A.8.7.target_control_title: Computing hardware and software are monitored

ISO_27001_A.8.8.source_control_text: Information about technical vulnerabilities shall be obtained and appropriate measures taken.
ISO_27001_A.8.8.target_control_title: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded

ISO_27001_A.8.13.source_control_text: Backup copies of information shall be maintained and regularly tested.
ISO_27001_A.8.13.target_control_title: Backups of data are created, protected, maintained, and tested

ISO_27001_A.8.15.source_control_text: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events shall be produced.
ISO_27001_A.8.15.target_control_title: Log records are generated to enable monitoring

ISO_27001_A.8.16.source_control_text: Networks, systems and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour.
ISO_27001_A.8.16.target_control_title: Networks and network services are monitored

ISO_27001_A.8.20.source_control_text: Networks and network devices shall be secured, managed and controlled.
ISO_27001_A.8.20.target_control_title: Networks and environments are protected from unauthorized logical access

ISO_27001_A.8.24.source_control_text: Rules for the effective use of cryptography shall be defined and implemented.
ISO_27001_A.8.24.target_control_title: The confidentiality, integrity, and availability of data-in-transit are protected

ISO_27001_A.8.25.source_control_text: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be established.
ISO_27001_A.8.25.target_control_title: Secure software development practices are integrated
